message:
refactor(core): hoist zero-dimension check before multiplication loop in numel()

Move the zero-dimension short-circuit from inside the checked_mul loop
to a dedicated any(dim == 0) scan before the loop. This is semantically
equivalent but clearer in intent: zero-dimension shapes always have zero
elements regardless of other dimension values, so checking upfront avoids
entering the multiplication loop at all.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
